hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */ios/Sources/UnifiedQuery/UnifiedQuery.swift|*/android/sample/unifiedquery/src/main/kotlin/uniffi/unfydqry/unfydqry.kt) echo "Blocked: this is an auto-generated UniFFI binding (see AGENTS.md). Do not hand-edit it. Change core/ and run 'make gen-bindings' to regenerate." >&2; exit 2;; esac
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.rs) cargo fmt --manifest-path "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/core/Cargo.toml" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true;; esac
